title: clinanthus fulvus
intro: Clinanthus fulvus is a flowering plant species, also known as the golden trumpets, belonging to the family Alstroemeriaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Clinanthus fulvus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
